chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 240 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.1013/2024 (Stay) 2. For hearing of main case 27.03.2024 Mr. Muhammad Rafique Rajput, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant Prosecutor General. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Ali Gul Abbasi, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.5, whereas, statements have been filed on behalf of respondents No.2 and 4. Learned Counsel for petitioners, under instructions, withdraws this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as withdrawn along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
